convert The original art collection tax is $380,000 after applying the 5% discount to the 20% rate.
convert The initial real estate portfolio tax calculates to $950,000 based on the progressive brackets.
convert The securities portfolio generates a tax liability of $435,000 after the charitable deduction.
convert Summing these figures yields a total initial estate tax liability of $1,765,000.

convert The new real estate tax becomes $1,050,000 due to the higher valuation in the top bracket.
convert Adding the adjusted real estate tax to the unchanged art and securities taxes results in a new total.
convert The final corrected total tax liability for the entire estate is $1,865,000.
